'''Sydney Walker''' was an actor that provided the voice for the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Deej Warrick]] in ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' and ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''.
